requirement_topic.en: TRA Mandatory Radio Type Approval (Telecom Law 431/2002)
requirement_topic.zh: TRA强制无线电型号认证（电信法431/2002）
requirement_topic.zht: TRA強制無線電型號認證（電信法431/2002）

summary.en: All radio and telecom terminal equipment (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, LoRa, IoT, and any device using radio spectrum) must obtain TRA mandatory type approval under Lebanon Telecom Law 431/2002 before import or sale in Lebanon. The TRA (Telecommunications Regulatory Authority — هيئة ناظمة للاتصالات) issues a type approval certificate upon successful review of a technical file and test reports from an accredited laboratory. The TRA approval certificate number must be associated with the device for customs clearance and sale. CE test reports from accredited labs may be submitted as a technical basis, but TRA makes its own determination; CE DoC alone is not accepted as a substitute. FCC ID and SRRC are not recognised. OGERO (Office des Installations Electriques et Mécaniques et des Lignes de Telecommunications) manages telecom infrastructure interconnection; compliance with TRA type approval is a precondition for OGERO-connected devices. Arabic and/or French language documentation is strongly preferred by TRA and customs authorities. Lebanon has no mutual recognition arrangement with China, the EU, or the US that would waive TRA type approval.
summary.zh: 所有无线电及电信终端设备（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝、LoRa、物联网及任何使用无线频谱的设备）须依据《黎巴嫩电信法》431/2002取得TRA强制型号认证，方可进口或在黎巴嫩销售。黎巴嫩TRA（هيئة ناظمة للاتصالات）在审核技术档案和经认可实验室出具的测试报告后颁发型号认证证书。TRA认证证书编号须与设备关联，用于清关和销售。经认可实验室出具的CE测试报告可作为技术依据提交，但TRA自行作出裁定；仅凭CE符合性声明不被接受作为替代。FCC ID和SRRC不被承认。OGERO负责管理电信基础设施互联；符合TRA型号认证是连接OGERO网络设备的前提条件。TRA和海关当局强烈建议提供阿拉伯语和/或法语文件。黎巴嫩与中国、欧盟或美国之间不存在可豁免TRA型号认证的相互承认安排。
summary.zht: 所有無線電及電信終端設備（Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩、LoRa、物聯網及任何使用無線頻譜的設備）須依據《黎巴嫩電信法》431/2002取得TRA強制型號認證，方可進口或在黎巴嫩銷售。黎巴嫩TRA（هيئة ناظمة للاتصالات）在審核技術檔案和經認可實驗室出具的測試報告後頒發型號認證證書。TRA認證證書編號須與裝置關聯，用於清關和銷售。經認可實驗室出具的CE測試報告可作為技術依據提交，但TRA自行作出裁定；僅憑CE符合性聲明不被接受作為替代。FCC ID和SRRC不被承認。OGERO負責管理電信基礎設施互聯；符合TRA型號認證是連接OGERO網路裝置的前提條件。TRA和海關當局強烈建議提供阿拉伯語和/或法語文件。黎巴嫩與中國、歐盟或美國之間不存在可豁免TRA型號認證的相互承認安排。

standards_or_laws: TRA Type Approval Procedures and Requirements (Lebanon)
ETSI EN 300 328 (2.4 GHz WLAN/Bluetooth) — submitted as test basis
ETSI EN 301 893 (5 GHz WLAN) — submitted as test basis
ETSI EN 300 220 (SRD / LoRa) — submitted as test basis

summary.en: In China, radio type approval is administered by MIIT/SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China). Telecom terminal equipment connecting to public telecom networks additionally requires a MIIT Network Access License (NAL). CCC (China Compulsory Certification) covers electrical safety and EMC for in-scope products under the CCC catalogue. GB standards, SRRC approval, and CCC marks are applicable only within China and are not recognised by Lebanon TRA.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线电型号认证由工信部/国家无线电管理局（SRRC）负责。连接公共电信网络的电信终端设备还须取得工信部网络接入许可（NAL）。CCC（中国强制认证）涵盖列入CCC目录的产品的电气安全和EMC。GB标准、SRRC批准及CCC标志仅适用于中国境内，不被黎巴嫩TRA承认。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線電型號認證由工信部/國家無線電管理局（SRRC）負責。連接公共電信網路的電信終端設備還須取得工信部網路接入許可（NAL）。CCC（中國強制認證）涵蓋列入CCC目錄的產品的電氣安全和EMC。GB標準、SRRC批准及CCC標誌僅適用於中國境內，不被黎巴嫩TRA承認。

standards_or_laws: MIIT SRRC Radio Type Approval (Regulations on Radio Administration, Article 58)
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — Measures for Telecom Equipment Access

gap.en: TRA type approval under Telecom Law 431/2002 is a wholly independent process from SRRC, CCC, CE, or FCC. Neither SRRC approval nor CCC certification is recognised by TRA. Lebanon has no regional mutual recognition arrangement that extends to Chinese, EU, or US approvals. A fresh TRA application with accredited-lab test reports and a complete technical file is required for every model imported or sold in Lebanon. Arabic and/or French documentation is strongly preferred by TRA and Lebanese customs. CE test reports may be submitted as a technical basis but are not a substitute for TRA's own determination.
gap.zh: 依据《电信法》431/2002的TRA型号认证与SRRC、CCC、CE或FCC完全独立。TRA不承认SRRC批准或CCC认证。黎巴嫩不存在延伸至中国、欧盟或美国批准的区域性相互承认安排。每款在黎巴嫩进口或销售的产品均须重新进行TRA申请，提交经认可实验室出具的测试报告和完整技术档案。TRA和黎巴嫩海关强烈建议提供阿拉伯语和/或法语文件。CE测试报告可作为技术依据提交，但不能替代TRA的自行裁定。
gap.zht: 依據《電信法》431/2002的TRA型號認證與SRRC、CCC、CE或FCC完全獨立。TRA不承認SRRC批准或CCC認證。黎巴嫩不存在延伸至中國、歐盟或美國批准的區域性相互承認安排。每款在黎巴嫩進口或銷售的產品均須重新進行TRA申請，提交經認可實驗室出具的測試報告和完整技術檔案。TRA和黎巴嫩海關強烈建議提供阿拉伯語和/或法語文件。CE測試報告可作為技術依據提交，但不能替代TRA的自行裁定。

source.publisher: TRA — Telecommunications Regulatory Authority (Lebanon / هيئة ناظمة للاتصالات)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] TRA type approval is mandatory for all wireless and telecom terminal equipment imported or sold in Lebanon under Telecom Law 431/2002. SRRC, CCC, CE DoC, and FCC ID are not accepted substitutes. Lebanon has no mutual recognition arrangement extending to Chinese approvals. Arabic/French documentation is strongly preferred by TRA and customs.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据《电信法》431/2002，TRA型号认证对所有在黎巴嫩进口或销售的无线及电信终端设备为强制要求。SRRC、CCC、CE DoC及FCC ID不可作为替代。黎巴嫩不存在延伸至中国批准的相互承认安排。TRA和海关强烈建议提供阿拉伯语/法语文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據《電信法》431/2002，TRA型號認證對所有在黎巴嫩進口或銷售的無線及電信終端設備為強制要求。SRRC、CCC、CE DoC及FCC ID不可作為替代。黎巴嫩不存在延伸至中國批准的相互承認安排。TRA和海關強烈建議提供阿拉伯語/法語文件。
